name: PT Bukit Uluwatu Villa Tbk
summary: PT Bukit Uluwatu Villa Tbk operates environmental friendly hotels and resorts in Indonesia. It operates through three segments: Hotel; Lifestyle, Recreation, and Entertainment; and Real Estate. The company primarily owns and operates Alila Ubud, Alila Manggis, Alila Villas Uluwatu, Alila SCBD, and Dialoog Banyuwangi properties. It provides hospitality, food, and beverage services; trading, construction, industrial, agricultural, printing, transportation, and workshop services; and hotel guest rooms and restaurant services. The company also sells land or villas. PT Bukit Uluwatu Villa Tbk was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
